profile_summary: This trip profile suggests that practical readiness matters more than over-planning. Because this is your first time in China and you do not speak much Chinese, transport, communication, and backup access to key information should be your top priorities. Focus on a few high-value preparations before departure so your first day feels much more manageable.
top_risks: Because this is your first trip to China, your arrival-day structure matters more than optimization.
Since you do not speak much Chinese, destination visibility and communication support will reduce a lot of small travel friction.
Because you are especially concerned about payments, it is worth setting up both a main option and a backup before departure.

critical_tasks.title: Decide your main payment method
critical_tasks.why_it_matters: Payment is one of the most important travel basics.
critical_tasks.fallback_option: Use a backup card or emergency cash.

critical_tasks.title: Prepare a backup payment method
critical_tasks.why_it_matters: Your main method may fail unexpectedly.
critical_tasks.risk_if_missing: You may get stuck during transport or meals.
critical_tasks.fallback_option: Carry a second card and some cash.

critical_tasks.title: Decide your internet access plan
critical_tasks.why_it_matters: You need connectivity for maps, bookings, and communication.
critical_tasks.fallback_option: Use airport or hotel Wi-Fi temporarily.

critical_tasks.title: Save your hotel address in Chinese
critical_tasks.why_it_matters: One of the most useful tools for first arrival.

critical_tasks.title: Plan your airport-to-hotel route
critical_tasks.why_it_matters: Arrival is stressful, and deciding on the spot is harder.
critical_tasks.risk_if_missing: Delays, confusion, and a worse first impression.

critical_tasks.title: Prepare a taxi or driver card
Prepare an emergency fallback plan
critical_tasks.why_it_matters: Recovery matters as much as preparation.
critical_tasks.risk_if_missing: Small failures can become major stress.
critical_tasks.fallback_option: Keep paper backups and hotel contact.

important_tasks.title: Save hotel confirmations offline
important_tasks.why_it_matters: Needed for arrival, check-in, and taxi support.

important_tasks.title: Create one offline travel folder
important_tasks.why_it_matters: Keeps key materials in one place during stressful moments.
important_tasks.fallback_option: Use a dedicated photo album for screenshots.

important_tasks.title: Know what each app is for
important_tasks.why_it_matters: Too many unfamiliar apps create confusion.
important_tasks.risk_if_missing: You may open the wrong tool in urgent moments.
important_tasks.fallback_option: Keep a simple app cheat sheet.

important_tasks.title: Save hotel name, address, and phone
important_tasks.why_it_matters: Needed for check-in, taxi, and problem recovery.
important_tasks.risk_if_missing: Harder to reach and confirm your hotel.

important_tasks.title: Share your itinerary with someone you trust
important_tasks.why_it_matters: Helpful if you need support from afar.
important_tasks.fallback_option: Email itinerary to yourself and one contact.

optional_tasks.title: Install your core travel apps
optional_tasks.fallback_option: Use browser or ask for help.

optional_tasks.title: Plan your first easy meal
optional_tasks.why_it_matters: Arrival day is not the best time for complex food decisions.
optional_tasks.fallback_option: Ask hotel staff for something simple nearby.

arrival_guide.title: Before landing
arrival_guide.body: Before the plane lands, review your first three steps: confirm internet access, open your hotel information, and know how you plan to get to your hotel.

arrival_guide.title: At the airport
arrival_guide.body: As early as possible after landing, confirm that your phone and internet plan are working. If they are not, use airport Wi-Fi or ask at a service desk.

arrival_guide.title: Keep your hotel details ready
arrival_guide.body: Before leaving the airport, open your hotel booking, address, and phone number so you can show them quickly if needed.

arrival_guide.title: Choose transport before you exit
arrival_guide.body: Decide how you will get to your hotel before you leave the airport area. Making the decision earlier reduces confusion and stress.

arrival_guide.title: Show your destination clearly
arrival_guide.body: Keep your hotel or destination address visible on your phone so you can show it quickly during your first ride.

communication_cards.title: Show this to your driver
communication_cards.english_text: Hello, please take me to this address. Thank you.
communication_cards.chinese_text: 你好，请带我去这个地址，谢谢。
communication_cards.notes: Attach hotel or destination address below in Chinese.

communication_cards.title: Hotel check-in
communication_cards.english_text: Hello, I have a booking here. I would like to check in.
communication_cards.chinese_text: 你好，我有预订，我想办理入住。
communication_cards.notes: Show together with passport and booking confirmation.

communication_cards.title: I need help
communication_cards.english_text: Hello, I need some help. Could you please help me?
communication_cards.chinese_text: 你好，我需要帮助。可以帮帮我吗？
communication_cards.notes: Useful in stations, malls, streets, and service counters.

communication_cards.title: Please speak slowly
communication_cards.english_text: Sorry, I don’t speak much Chinese. Please speak slowly.
communication_cards.chinese_text: 对不起，我不太会说中文，请说慢一点。
communication_cards.notes: Very useful in hotel, taxi, and service situations.

warnings: Do not rely on only one payment method.
Keep your hotel address easy to show on your phone.
Keep your first day simple rather than trying to optimize everything at once.
